cover.subtitle:
태조에서 공민왕까지,
474년의 왕업적.
cover.imagePrompt: 10th-12th century Goryeo dynasty palace courtyard illustration. ONE Goryeo king in jade-green royal robe seated on a low throne. In front of him: a scholar (Choe Seungro) presenting a scroll. Background: red-painted wooden palace pillars and a folding screen with mountain-water painting. Color: jade-green + crimson + gold. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 광종 노비안검법. 호족 약화, 왕권 강화.

outro.tip_headline:
"광종 노비안검 · 성종 시무 28조"
왕별 트레이드마크 외울 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 왕별 핵심 정책 매칭(광종-노비안검·과거제, 성종-시무 28조·12목, 현종-귀주대첩, 문종-전시과 정비, 공민왕-쌍성총관부) 빈출.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized Goryeo crown silhouette with three horizontal scroll bars beneath suggesting royal decrees. Jade-green + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
